title: × tormaria latifolia
intro: × Tormaria latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved tormaria, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing swelling and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. × Tormaria latifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to traditional herbal remedies.
